description: Assistant Manager hooks - session memory persistence and user communication
_note: Hook data is passed via stdin as JSON. Scripts read from stdin, not env vars.

SessionStart._description: Load session memory and context at startup

UserPromptSubmit._description: Records the user's last-input timestamp on every prompt through the FROZEN CLI (`aimaestro-agent.sh session user-input`) — never a direct HTTP call to the server (R23). The CLI resolves auth itself from $AID_AUTH. This feeds AI Maestro's user-presence data so amama-presence-tracker can compute idle time. Fail-soft: never blocks prompt submission.

Stop._description: Blocks exit until all coordination work is complete
